description: Task decomposition and planning proficiency benchmark

tasks.input_data: Plan a fix for a settings page where saving an empty display name incorrectly succeeds.
tasks.expected_output: An ordered plan to reproduce the issue, add boundary validation, show a user-facing error, add regression tests, and verify the settings flow.

tasks.input_data: Plan a backward-compatible API migration from GET /users?active=true to GET /users?status=active for external clients.
tasks.expected_output: A phased plan covering contract inventory, dual-parameter support, precedence and validation rules, client communication, telemetry, deprecation, and removal criteria.

tasks.input_data: Plan reliability work for a queue consumer that occasionally processes the same message twice after worker restarts.
tasks.expected_output: A plan covering reproduction, idempotency keys, atomic state transitions, retry and dead-letter behavior, observability, failure tests, staged rollout, and rollback signals.
